title: ferray-window: remaining scipy.signal windows (flattop, bohman, boxcar, triang, lanczos, dpss, chebwin)
description: Follow-up from #531. ferray-window ships ~14 scipy windows already. Add: flattop, bohman, boxcar, triang, lanczos (simple closed-form coefficients), and dpss / chebwin (need numerical solvers, separate larger task).
